Headline: Bringing years of UX/UI experience into the world of AI/ML. Looking for LIA internship, autumn 2026.
Summary: Great ideas often come through conversations with colleagues, customers and users. Curiosity and social know-how are just as important design skills as mastering Sketch. Finding out Why, How and What have great impact on the design strategi and the success of the whole project.   I need to feel that my work makes a difference. It doesn’t have to be a huge one, just knowing that it makes someones life easier, more fun or productive is enough. In other words: To increase the awesome and decrease the suck.
